problem id: 547485e9
category: bit_manipulation

rule: ROT(7) XOR SHR(2)

examples:
  10000101 -> 11100011
  11000110 -> 01010010
  01110001 -> 10100100
  10101111 -> 11111100
  11011100 -> 01011001
  11001011 -> 11010111
  01011111 -> 10111000
  01100000 -> 00101000
  10001101 -> 11100101

query: 11000111
predicted answer: 11010010
